UGC CEO — The Course

this calculator is normally part of my paid course — so you're already getting a taste of what's inside. if you want to turn your UGC into a real business, not just a side hustle, the course covers everything: pitching brands, contracts, scaling, and getting paid consistently.

Add this tool to your phone

Save this calculator to your home screen so it opens like an app. No app store needed. Follow the 4 steps below.

01
Open in your browser & tap the three dots
Open this page in Safari (iPhone) or Chrome (Android). Tap the ··· button at the bottom of your screen.
tap the ··· button
02
Tap "Share"
A menu appears. Tap Share — this opens your phone's share sheet where the home screen option lives.
tap "Share" from the menu
03
Tap "Add to Home Screen"
Scroll in the share sheet and tap Add to Home Screen. Change the name to UGC Calculator and confirm.
tap "Add to Home Screen"
04
Done — it looks like this on your phone
Tap the icon and it opens full screen like a native app. Use it anytime you need to quote a deal on the spot — even offline.
your UGC Calculator icon on the home screen
💡 Works best in Safari on iPhone or Chrome on Android. Works offline once saved.
About Victoria

My name is Victoria and I have been a full-time UGC creator for over 5 years. I started doing this before UGC was even a term back then and helped grow TikTok’s UGC program and mentor other creators along the way. I made this pricing list from years of experience so you don’t make the same mistakes as I made in the past. I hope it helps and lets stay in touch ❤
